heading: Commingling of agricultural products
label: 248 Commingling of agricultural products

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: A warehouse operator may commingle agricultural products in a manner approved by the Secretary.

children.heading: Liability
children.label: b Liability
children.text: A warehouse operator shall be severally liable to each depositor or holder for the care and redelivery of the share of the depositor and holder of the commingled agricultural product to the same extent and under the same circumstances as if the agricultural products had been stored separately.
